t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. 12 distinct values: CySEC, FCA, FSA Seychelles, ASIC & GAML, FSRA, FinCEN+FINRA, BVI, ASIC, FinCEN, eToroUS, None, NFA. Resolved via `JOIN Dim_Regulation dr1 ON fsc.RegulationID = dr1.DWHRegulationID; SELECT dr1.Name`.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded. Passthrough from position-level audit data (BI_DB_EY_Audit_Opened_Positions), ultimately from Dim_Position.InstrumentID.

issues.problem: Tier 1 attribution to Trade.PositionTbl relies on inference through BI_DB_EY_Audit_Opened_Positions (populated by SP_EY_Audit_Opened_Positions, not in bundle). Same uncertainty as InstrumentType but not flagged in review-needed sidecar.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist table showing which phases were completed/skipped. Footer says Phases: 11/14 but does not itemize.
Join to BI_DB_EY_Audit_Automation_UnrealizedCommissions_Results says ON Date but should clarify exact column name and type to avoid ambiguity with DateID (int) vs Date (date).
Atlassian section empty due to MCP unavailability during regen run. Acknowledged in review-needed sidecar.
Tier 2 assignment is conservative but correct given missing SP_EY_Audit_Opened_Positions code. Review-needed sidecar correctly flags this for future upgrade.
